summary: A single-story stable or ranch building with a distinctive L-shaped footprint. Features two tall brick chimneys with overhanging caps, dark wood plank roofing, horizontal striped walls in brick and stone with white fence trim, and a central courtyard area. The structure is surrounded by a white block perimeter fence and sits on a dirt foundation.

shape.symmetry: bilateral symmetry along main axis with two matching chimneys

elements: two tall chimneys with overhanging stone caps
gable roof with dark wood planks
horizontal striped wall pattern (brick and stone alternating)
rebuild_hints: Construct L-shaped footprint with two perpendicular wings meeting at right angle
Build two tall brick chimneys (approximately 5-6 blocks tall) positioned symmetrically
Add overhanging stone/dark material caps to chimney tops
Create horizontal striped wall pattern alternating brick and stone blocks
Install dark wood plank roof with gable pitch across both wings
Surround entire structure with white fence blocks at ground level
Leave central courtyard area open and unfilled
Apply dirt/brown blocks as ground foundation beneath structure
Ensure chimneys extend above roofline with visible caps
uncertainties: Exact interior layout and room divisions not clearly visible from exterior views
Precise block count for wall height (appears 3-4 blocks but perspective varies)
Whether courtyard is fully enclosed or open on one side
Specific roof pitch angle and exact plank arrangement pattern
Interior chimney connectivity and flue routing
Exact material composition of striped bands (may include additional variants)
